creator: scottro@nyc.rr.com
text:
I can confirm that this problem still exists.  As has been mentioned on
the openoffice mailing list, it can sometimes be fixed by building
-DWITHOUT_MOZILLA.  For the last two development builds (2.0.20060712
and 2.0.20060719) I've found that if I don't include the
-DWITHOUT_MOZILLA option it will fail on both CURRENT and STABLE, in the
same place as this PR. 

If I include the -DWITHOUT_MOZILLA option, both the 719 build and the
previous 712 build still fail on STABLE (with the same error, at
build_instsetoo_native) but will complete successfully on CURRENT.




-- 

Scott Robbins
